Index.title: Cueva Thalía — The experience of a timeless place

Home.meta_title: Cueva Thalía | Private troglodyte home with indoor pool — Tenerife
Home.meta_description: Private troglodyte home in Tenerife with heated indoor pool. Stay, event or retreat. Direct booking up to 14 guests. San Miguel de Abona.
Home.hero_tagline: The experience of a timeless place
Home.hero_lead: A troglodyte home carved into the rock. A pause in the south of Tenerife.
Home.pathways_title: Three ways to live the cueva
Home.pathway1_text: A private pause in Tenerife, between volcanic rock, warm water and silence.
Home.pathway2_text: A birthday, an intimate celebration, a photo shoot or a moment to share in an extraordinary place.
Home.pathway3_text: Yoga, meditation, workshops and retreats — an intimate setting to slow down and reconnect.
Home.story_p1: When Manon bought this house in San Miguel de Abona, a natural cave lay sleeping beneath the garden — invisible, untouched.
Home.story_p2: Four and a half years later, she discovered it by chance.
Home.story_p3: Cueva Thalía was born from that moment: an intimate, private place where rock, warm water and silence become an experience.
Home.promise1_text: A fully private place for every stay. Here, calm, space and intimacy are never shared.
Home.promise2_text: Built into the volcanic rock, the cave keeps a gentle, pleasant temperature in every season.
Home.promise3_text: Between the ocean, Mount Teide and the finest villages in southern Tenerife, everything is close. Except stress.
Home.pool_text: An oasis carved into the stone. The water stays warm all year. Here, the indoor pool is 100% private and permanently heated between 34°C and 40°C.
Home.location_intro: Cueva Thalía is in San Miguel de Abona, in a calm setting close to beaches, restaurants and key places in south Tenerife.
Home.location_map_aria: OpenStreetMap of south Tenerife with Cueva Thalía and nearby destinations
Home.cta_title: When would you like to come?
Home.cta_subtitle: One unique place. It can only be booked once at a time.
Home.cookie_text: We use cookies to measure traffic and improve your experience. You choose what to accept.

Sejourner.title: Stay
Sejourner.hero_subtitle: Sleep inside the rock. Wake up to warm water. Slow down, in complete privacy.
Sejourner.capacity_standard: Standard setup: up to 14 guests with direct booking.
Sejourner.capacity_group: Group setup: up to 16 guests with additional mattresses.
Sejourner.capacity_contact: Any request for more than 14 guests is handled via WhatsApp or email.
Sejourner.rate_line2: €250 / night Friday, Saturday, Sunday and public holidays.
Sejourner.rate_line3: Progressive rates available for multiple nights.
Sejourner.rate_line4: Groups, events and special setups: custom quote.
Sejourner.cta_whatsapp_quote: Request a custom quote on WhatsApp
Sejourner.opt_surprise: Champagne, flowers or pastry on arrival
Sejourner.opt_late_checkout: Late check-out / early check-in (subject to availability)
Sejourner.private_reminder: The cave, pool, and outdoors are private with every booking.
Sejourner.seo_intro: A fully private troglodyte home in south Tenerife. The rock, the heated indoor pool and the garden are yours alone.
Sejourner.faq_a1: Yes. The cave, heated pool, garden and outdoor areas are exclusively yours.
Sejourner.faq_a2: Up to 14 guests with direct booking. Queen bedroom, double sofa bed and additional bedding depending on your setup.
Sejourner.faq_a3: Between 34 and 40°C depending on season. Indoor pool, usable year-round.
Sejourner.faq_a4: No platform fees, personal contact and tailored options.
Sejourner.booking_group_text: For groups of 15 to 16 people, contact us directly — the cave can host up to 16 people with additional mattresses.
Sejourner.booking_noscript: Enable JavaScript to book online, or contact us directly.

Evenements.hero_subtitle: A moment to share, in an extraordinary place.
Evenements.body_text: Birthday, photo shoot, small wedding or private celebration — every project is shaped with you, in respect of the place.
Evenements.groups_line2: Capacity to be confirmed depending on the event format.
Evenements.groups_line3: Custom quote via WhatsApp or email.

Evenements.process_3_desc: The place is prepared for your celebration.

Workshops.title: Retreats & Workshops
Workshops.hero_subtitle: A calm, private setting for yoga, meditation, workshops and retreats.
Workshops.capacity_text: Up to 12 participants depending on the format. Option to sleep up to 16 guests with additional mattresses.
Workshops.seo_intro: Yoga, meditation, breathwork or creative retreats: an intimate setting for wellness professionals.
Workshops.process_2_desc: We adapt the format to the spaces.
Workshops.process_3_desc: A private, sensory place for your participants.

Galerie.title: Gallery
Galerie.intro: Explore the rock, the water, the garden — and the atmosphere of the place.
Galerie.chambre_group_bedding: For group stays, extra bedding is available in the cave: twelve floor mattresses, cosy nests beneath the rock vault.
Galerie.meta_description: Discover {category} at Cueva Thalía, a private troglodyte home in Tenerife.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.subtitle: We are at your disposal for any inquiries.
Contact.seo_intro: Every request receives a personal reply. We usually respond within 48h, faster on WhatsApp.
Contact.response_desc: WhatsApp: quick reply · Email: within 48h · Stay: real-time calendar on the Stay page.

Histoire.title: Our History
Histoire.content_p1: The house was purchased years before the natural cave underneath was discovered. For a long time, Manon was unaware of its existence.
Histoire.content_p2: About four and a half years later, she discovered the cave by chance. A surreal surprise, a gift of life.
Histoire.content_p3: Cueva Thalía was born from this discovery: transforming a hidden space into an immersive experience, human and timeless.
